languages.text: {n}Руолдо улыбается вам в ответ, и от движения мышц его лицо идет неприятными складками.{/n}
{n}Ruoldo smiles, causing his muscles to crease his attached face in a disturbing way.{/n}

languages.text: {n}罗尔多微笑起来，肌肉堆积在被扯平的脸上，令人心生不安。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Ruoldo smiles, causing his muscles to crease his attached face in a disturbing way.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}罗尔多微笑起来，肌肉堆积在被扯平的脸上，令人心生不安。{/n}

languages.text: {n}ルオルドが微笑むと、筋肉の動きによって縫い付けられた顔が不気味に歪んだ。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Ruoldo smiles, causing his muscles to crease his attached face in a disturbing way.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}ルオルドが微笑むと、筋肉の動きによって縫い付けられた顔が不気味に歪んだ。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Ruoldo sonríe, y la mueca hace que se formen inquietantes pliegues en la piel distendida de su rostro.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Ruoldo smiles, causing his muscles to crease his attached face in a disturbing way.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Gülümseyen Ruoldo'nun kasları, tutturulmuş yüzünü rahatsız edici bir şekilde buruşturuyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Le sourire de Ruoldo entraîne une déformation troublante du visage qu'il porte.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Als Ruoldo lächelt, verziehen seine Muskeln sein falsches Gesicht zu einer verstörenden Fratze.{/n}
